## Issue

- [ ] Missing content
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Outdated example
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other

## Description

What's wrong or missing?

## Suggested Fix

If you have a specific suggestion, describe it here.
